title: 5 Years Ago, Attack on Titan Reached Its Controversial Conclusion
content: The acclaimed Attack on Titan manga reached its controversial conclusion on April 9th, 2021, and yet the series’ popularity only continues to grow even now. The manga written and illustrated by Hajime Isayama began its serialization in 2009 and reached unprecedented heights of popularity after the anime debut in 2013.
author: ComicBook

title: Acclaimed Sports Anime Gets Major Streaming Update Ahead of Sequel Film
content: The exciting Spring 2026 anime season is here with some of the greatest series and films ever. Major platforms have already begun streaming the biggest shows of the season, with Crunchyroll taking the helm with dozens of shows like every other season.
author: ComicBook

title: Studio Ghibli Animates 'Majo no Tani no Yoru' Short for Ghibli Park
content: Studio Ghibli announced on Tuesday that it is producing a new short anime titled "Majo no Tani no Yoru" (A Night in the Valley of Witches) that will debut on July 8 exclusively at the Cinema Orion in the Ghibli's Grand Warehouse, located in Ghibli Park.
author: ANN

title: Netflix’s Biggest Anime of The Year Hits Major Box Office Milestone
content: 2026 kicked off with an exciting anime film on Netflix , Cosmic Princess Kaguya , which immediately became a massive hit on the platform and crossed over a million views globally in just three days. The film is praised for its gorgeous animation and sci-fi themes on top of having an interesting story.
author: ComicBook

title: Live-Action Gundam Film Announces More Cast
content: Netflix announced more cast members for the latest incarnation of Sunrise and Legendary Pictures ' live-action Gundam film project on Monday. The company also confirmed that production has begun in Queensland, Australia and provided a short description of the film's original story.
author: ANN

title: Spy x Family Unveils First Look At Special Live-Action Sequel
content: Spy x Family premiered its highly anticipated Season 3 in October as part of the Fall 2025 lineup, as fans await a sequel. The latest season was a rollercoaster of emotions, blending heartbreaking moments with nonsensical comedy as the characters get involved in dangerous situations that threaten the peace between…
author: ComicBook

title: 7 Years Later, Netflix Loses One of Its Best Supernatural Fantasy Anime
content: With the anime industry growing in popularity across the globe, it wouldn’t be an exaggeration to say it’s already one of the mainstream media forms. While Crunchyroll is the largest global hub of anime series and films for fans, Netflix finds all kinds of unique films and series for viewers to enjoy.
author: ComicBook

title: One Piece Sets Up Imu’s Biggest Fight in Elbaph And It’s Not With Luffy
content: Warning: This article contains spoilers from the One Piece manga! The Elbaph Arc in One Piece is getting more intense than ever after the unexpected arrival of Imu. Fans have been anticipating the arc for over two decades, and it didn’t disappoint at all with all the new character introductions and the truth about the…

title: Dragon Ball Super Star Teases New Goku vs. Frieza Fight
content: Dragon Ball Super is the latest entry in the franchise, based on Akira Toriyama’s original creation, and it continues to elevate the legendary creator’s work to new heights. Ever since the major announcement that Super would be expanded with the Galactic Patrol Prisoner saga, adapting the manga at the franchise’s 40th…
author: ComicBook

title: Dragon Ball Super Exec Explains Why New Anime Remake Was Needed
content: At the major event for Dragon Ball’ s 40th anniversary, it was announced that the series’ latest canon entry, Dragon Ball Super , will be getting an expansion with a new arc being adapted, along with an intriguing project, a remake of the events of the Battle of Gods arc from the series.
author: ComicBook
